rules_applied: Canonical naming — Machines: all '*-Machine' compounds hyphenated. 'Tractor-Machine' (c, hyphenated) standardized across 7 cells (was 'Traktor Machine' / 'Traktor-Machine').
Canonical naming — Bumpkin Village → Klotegem (was wrongly 'Muilegem' at E5_CircusMain R240; Muilegem = Fannyside).
Punctuation — curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight ' (Tom directive 2026-04-28; project standardizes on straight). Includes 1 mixed-apostrophe cell at E1_Farm R24.
Punctuation — Unicode ellipsis … (U+2026) → three dots '...' (Tom directive 2026-04-28).

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: Aw dang! The Tractor-Machine's choking. Maybe it needs a break.
corrections.current_nl: Amai héé! De Traktor Machine verslikte zich. Misschien moet dat ding efkes rusten.
corrections.proposed_nl: Amai héé! De Tractor-Machine verslikte zich. Misschien moet dat ding efkes rusten.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: How the hell are we gonna make it back to our Farm without the ding dang Tractor-Machine?
corrections.current_nl: Godverdoemme, hoe gaan we in 't hemelsnaam terug geraken naar onze Boerderij zonder die verdomde Traktor Machine, héé?
corrections.proposed_nl: Godverdoemme, hoe gaan we in 't hemelsnaam terug geraken naar onze Boerderij zonder die verdomde Tractor-Machine, héé?

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: Ever since she got laid off, and replaced by that dang Tractor-Machine, it's like she's forgotten all about me.
corrections.current_nl: Sinds da' z'ontslagen is, en door die Traktor-Machine vervangen is, herkent ze me precies niet meer.
corrections.proposed_nl: Sinds da' z'ontslagen is, en door die Tractor-Machine vervangen is, herkent ze me precies niet meer.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: It's the Tractor-Machine...
corrections.current_nl: Dat is de Traktor-Machine...
corrections.proposed_nl: Dat is de Tractor-Machine...

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: Stupid Tractor-Machine.
corrections.current_nl: Stomme Traktor Machine.
corrections.proposed_nl: Stomme Tractor-Machine.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: We can ride the Tractor-Machine to the City!
corrections.current_nl: We kunnen met de Traktor Machine naar de Stad rijden!
corrections.proposed_nl: We kunnen met de Tractor-Machine naar de Stad rijden!

corrections.rationale: Project-wide canonicalization: all 'Machine' compounds hyphenated; spelling Tractor (with c)
corrections.english: So your Aunties and Uncles left on the Tractor-Machine to find them.
corrections.current_nl: Dus je tantes en nonkels zijn met de Traktor Machine vertrokken om hen te gaan zoeken.
corrections.proposed_nl: Dus je tantes en nonkels zijn met de Tractor-Machine vertrokken om hen te gaan zoeken.

corrections.rationale: Bumpkin Village → Klotegem (was wrongly 'Muilegem' which = Fannyside)
corrections.english: But his life was cut short during the tragic fires of Bumpkin Village exactly 6 months and 3 weeks ago.
corrections.current_nl: Maar zijn leven is vroegtijdig ten einde gekomen in de brand van Muilegem — exact 6 maand en 3 weken geleden.
corrections.proposed_nl: Maar zijn leven is vroegtijdig ten einde gekomen in de brand van Klotegem — exact 6 maand en 3 weken geleden.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Can you fetch me some water with that ol' bucket, from that ol' river up there?
corrections.current_nl: Zou’j mij wat water kunnen scheppen met dienen ouden emmer, van da' stukske rivier da' ginder ligt?
corrections.proposed_nl: Zou'j mij wat water kunnen scheppen met dienen ouden emmer, van da' stukske rivier da' ginder ligt?

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Wow, what a hard rock! I'm gonna keep it.
corrections.current_nl: Amai! Da’s een harde kei! Die steek ik bij!
corrections.proposed_nl: Amai! Da's een harde kei! Die steek ik bij!

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Wow, what a classic rock! This one might be my favourite!
corrections.current_nl: Wauw! Wat een klassieker! Da’s misschien mijn favoriet!
corrections.proposed_nl: Wauw! Wat een klassieker! Da's misschien mijn favoriet!

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: It's missing one of those round things...

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Cool! It fits perfectly!

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Is {$NewName} giving you some good advice, Uncle Sad?

corrections.proposed_nl: Is {$NewName} u goeie raad aan 't geven, Nonkel Sad?

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: It's not easy for him being back inside the Mine.
corrections.current_nl: ’t Is nie makkelijk voor hem om terug in de Mijn te zijn.
corrections.proposed_nl: 't Is nie makkelijk voor hem om terug in de Mijn te zijn.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Don't worry, it's not your fault.
corrections.current_nl: ’t Is uw schuld nie, maak u geen zorgen.
corrections.proposed_nl: 't Is uw schuld nie, maak u geen zorgen.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Someone's whispering...
corrections.current_nl: Iemand is aan ’t fluisteren...
corrections.proposed_nl: Iemand is aan 't fluisteren...

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: That day in the Outhouse... I really thought that things would get better.
corrections.current_nl: Die dag in de Hudo... Ik dacht echt dat ’t beter ging worden.
corrections.proposed_nl: Die dag in de Hudo... Ik dacht echt dat 't beter ging worden.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: *oof*—Just sayin' it's a crazy idea!
corrections.current_nl: *oef*—’k zeg ’t gewoon: da’s een zotte gedacht!
corrections.proposed_nl: *oef*—'k zeg 't gewoon: da's een zotte gedacht!

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: We're just moving this boulder in case the flood starts to come any closer.
corrections.current_nl: We zijn dit rotsbloki aan ’t verleggen, voor als de vloed nog dichter komt.
corrections.proposed_nl: We zijn dit rotsbloki aan 't verleggen, voor als de vloed nog dichter komt.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Isn't there a better way to move a boulder?

corrections.proposed_nl: Is er geen betere manier om zo'n kei te verleggen?

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Comrade, I want more in life.

corrections.proposed_nl: Kameraad, ik wil méér in 't leven.

corrections.rationale: Project-wide punctuation: curly apostrophe U+2019 → straight (Tom standardization)
corrections.english: Just because yer wantin' more in life don't mean you got to abandon yer home!

corrections.proposed_nl: Omdat ge meer wilt in 't leven, wilt dat nog nie zeggen dat ge uw thuis moet achterlaten!
